phrases.text_local: Deux billets adulte, s'il vous plaît.
phrases.pronunciation: duh bee-YEH ah-DOLT, seel voo PLEH
phrases.cultural_note: The permanent collection of the Musée des Confluences is free. Tickets are only required for temporary exhibitions. Check the website before visiting.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if there is a terrace with a view
phrases.text_local: Y a-t-il une terrasse avec vue ?
phrases.pronunciation: ee ah-TEEL oon teh-RAHS ah-VEK VOO
phrases.cultural_note: The Musée des Confluences has a rooftop terrace overlooking the junction of the Rhône and Saône rivers.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Egyptian mummies are displayed
phrases.text_local: Où sont exposées les momies égyptiennes ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo sohn ex-poh-ZAY lay moh-MEE ay-zhip-SYEHN
phrases.cultural_note: The museum's permanent galleries include Origins of the Universe, Species Origins, Civilizations, and Eternity — featuring genuine Egyptian mummies and artefacts.

responses.english: On the first floor, room two.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if there is an audio guide available
phrases.cultural_note: Audio guides are typically available in French, English, and other languages. The museum app also provides guided content for free on your own smartphone.

phrases.intent_en: Ask for the museum's opening hours
phrases.text_local: Quels sont les horaires d'ouverture du musée ?
phrases.pronunciation: kel sohn lay oh-RAIR doo-VAIRT-oor doo moo-ZAY
phrases.cultural_note: The museum is closed on Mondays. It opens late on Thursdays, which is ideal for avoiding weekend crowds.

responses.phonetic: duh deez UHR TRAHNT ah deez-weet UHR
responses.french: De dix heures trente à dix-huit heures.
